name: Comma v0.1-2T
archDisplay: Dense decoder-only transformer, Llama 3 architecture, 7B, trained with 4096-token sequences
note: 7B model trained for 2T tokens (1.93T main phase + 75.5B cool-down) entirely on the openly-licensed/public-domain 'Common Pile v0.1' dataset (8TB), demonstrating that legally clean training data can rival models trained on unlicensed web text; a 1T-token sibling checkpoint (comma-v0.1-1t) was released alongside it.
